title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 454.1730 - Applicability of certain state laws
text:
454.1730.  Applicability of certain state laws. — The provisions of sections 210.817, 210.822, 210.823, 210.834, and 210.836 shall apply to a proceeding under sections 454.1500 to 454.1728, but no other provisions of sections 210.817 through 210.852 shall apply.
(L. 2011 H.B. 260)
